title: Snap Inc. Q1 2024 Earnings Summary
text:
Snap Inc. Q1 2024 Earnings Summary

Financial Performance

Snap delivered mixed results in Q1 2024. The company exceeded revenue expectations with $1,195 million, a 21% increase year-over-year, but significantly disappointed on profitability metrics.

The net loss widened to $305 million, substantially worse than the anticipated $71.44 million loss. Diluted EPS fell to -$0.19, missing estimates of -$0.05.

Key Metrics

User Growth: Daily active users climbed 10% to 422 million, demonstrating continued platform engagement.

Cash Flow Concerns: Free cash flow plummeted 63% to $38 million, while operating cash flow declined 42% to $88 million, signals of deteriorating financial health.

Bright Spot: Snapchat+ subscription revenue tripled year-over-year, showing success in diversification efforts.

Forward Outlook

Management projects Q2 2024 revenue between $1,225-$1,255 million, representing 15-18% year-over-year growth. The company anticipates DAUs reaching approximately 431 million.

Analysis

While revenue growth remains solid and user engagement is strong, persistent profitability challenges and sharply declining cash flows present concerns. The company's heavy investments in AI and AR aim to drive future monetization, but immediate financial performance remains problematic for investors.
